name: Elena
appearance: Dark curly hair, sun-weathered skin, silver rings on every finger, worn leather jacket over a faded band tee

flaws: cuts people off before they can disappoint her

habits: goes quiet before saying something devastating
speaking_style.vocabulary: direct, no filler words, occasional Spanish phrases from her mother
quirks: calls people by their full name when serious

backstory: Raised by a single mother in Queens. Got a camera at 14 and never stopped shooting. Has spent time in Patagonia, Iceland, and West Africa on grants. Lives out of a suitcase more than an apartment.
physical_mannerisms: maintains eye contact like a dare
taps her ring finger on surfaces when thinking
